en: That's Calvin Klein. Oh, my God, he's a dream.
ko: 저건 칼빈 클라인이야. 오, 세상에, 그는 꿈의 남자야.
ja: あれはカルバン・クラインだ。なんて素敵な人なの。
zhTW: 那是乙文·克萊因。天哪，他是夢中情人。
vi: Do la Calvin Klein. Troi oi, anh ay la nguoi trong mo.

en: Whoa, whoa, kid, kid. Stop, stop. Stop, stop.
ja: おい、坊主、止まれ、止まれ。
vi: Oi, cu cau, dung lai, dung lai.

en: I'll get it back to you, all right? It's broken.
vi: Toi se tra lai cho anh, duoc chu?

en: Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa. Go, go, go, go.
What's that thing he's on? It's a board with wheels.
ja: 車輪付きの板だ。本当に素敵な人ね。
zhTW: 是有輪子的板子。他真是夢中情人。
vi: La tam van co banh xe. Anh ay that la nguoi trong mo.

en: He's an absolute dream. Come on, come on, come on, come on.
vi: Nhanh len, nhanh len, nhanh len, nhanh len!
